changes: Ran the records mainline workbench on RunPod after fixing the TorchDynamo import alias in the records trainer; installed zstandard on the pod so zstd export could complete.
summary_note: End-to-end 1xH100 smoke succeeded, but the roundtrip gap was very large and the artifact used only about 5.0MB of the 16MB budget, so this run is useful as a systems checkpoint, not a competitive score.
